parameters.responseBody:
={
  "ok": true,
  "applicantName": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.applicantName}}",
  "applicantEmail": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.applicantEmail}}",
  "contactId": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.contactId}}",
  "dealId": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.finalDealId}}",
  "actionTaken": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.actionTaken}}",
  "tasksCreated": {{ $items('Create HubSpot Task').length || 0 }},
  "routeDetected": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.routeDetected}}",
  "dealStage": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.dealStage}}",
  "nextStep": "{{$('Set Final Deal ID').first().json.nextStep}}"
}
